calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-21-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-21-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., specially appearing CANAL INSURANCE COMPANY, a corporation.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant DARYIS MACKEY.
Defendants Does 1-10 are ordered dismissed without prejudice.

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff CANAL INSURANCE COMPANY and against Defendant DARYIS MACKEY as follows:
Principal $3,047.93
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 10% $580.36
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $288.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $3,916.29
Judgment signed in open court.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Deem Admitted The First Set Of Req. For Admissions Served On Deft Daryis Mackey And Req. For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances, Atty. Elizabeth McDonald (415-922-5939) special appearance for plaintiff Canal Insurance Company moving party. No other appearance.

The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF CANAL INSURANCE COMPANY, A CORPORATION's Motion To Deem Admitted The First Set Of Req. For Admissions Served On Defendant Daryis Mackey And request For Sanctions is GRANTed, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFF'S FIRST SET OF REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. DEFENDANT DARYIS MACKEY IS ORDERED TO PAY SANCTIONS TO PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $490 BY NO LATER THAN TEN DAYS AFTER SERVICE OF NOTICE OF THE COURT'S ORDER. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem Mark Schreiber, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)
